summary: Excellent soundboard capture of a stellar Dead performance, with reviewers praising the overall brilliance.
review: Both reviewers gush about how great this recording sounds, noting the high‑quality SBD source and calling the show "peak Dead". No specific songs or set details are mentioned, but the enthusiasm and perfect five‑star ratings indicate an outstanding musical experience that translates well through the crisp audio.

ai_rating.rationale: Two consistent 5‑star reviews highlight both superb soundboard quality and a top‑notch performance, warranting an almost perfect rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers describe the audio as "great" and "sounds great", indicating clear, well‑balanced sound with no noted issues.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on set structure; reviewers simply note the overall excellence of the show.
